text: Living a healthy life involves more than just eating well. A balanced diet with plenty of fruits, vegetables, and whole grains gives your body the energy it needs. Regular exercise, even a 30-minute walk each day, strengthens your heart and muscles. Equally important is getting enough sleep—seven to nine hours each night helps your body recover and your mind focus. Mental health matters too; taking time to relax or talk to friends can reduce stress. Finally, maintaining a work-life balance means setting boundaries between your job and personal time. By caring for all these areas, you can feel healthier and happier every day.
